rationale: CCC Domain C ("Human-AI Curriculum Collaboration") also draws on UNESCO AI CFT 1.1 ("Human agency", the Acquire-level competency block for Dimension 1: Human-centred mindset) -- specifically CCC-C1's requirement to "critically evaluate AI-generated curriculum suggestions... without ceding professional judgment", which is a direct instantiation of UNESCO's human agency principle in the curriculum-design context. Recorded as a second, independent relatedMatch alongside OE-ALIGN-000009 (to UNESCO 3.1) rather than folded into one record, since CCC Domain C genuinely spans both the technical (Dimension 3) and dispositional (Dimension 1) axes of the UNESCO framework -- collapsing them would understate what CCC Domain C actually requires.
subject: CCC-v1.0.0:OE-COMPETENCY-001010
